mapper.insert: insert into course_selection(id, user_id, user_name, user_type, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, teaching_class_id, teaching_class_code, status, create_time) values (#{id}, #{user_id}, #{user_name}, #{user_type}, #{course_id}, #{course_name}, #{teacher_id}, #{teacher_name}, #{teaching_class_id}, #{teaching_class_code}, #{status}, NOW())
